fields.name: Table Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field in Business Central.

fields.name: Int. Table Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the integration field to map to the Business Central field.

fields.name: Const Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the constant value that the mapped field will be set to.

fields.name: Validate Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field should be validated during assignment.

fields.name: Validate Integr. Table Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field should be validated during assignment in the integration table.

fields.name: Transformation Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies a rule for transforming imported text to a supported value before it can be mapped to a specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.
